title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Magellan, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Luffy, Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Magellan, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: His little brother would be killed too!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: There are no coincidences, only fate.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: We no longer need you alive.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Put up a hell of a fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You would be the dead one, strawhat!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Luffy, Blackbeard, Unknown person #4, Magellan, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.
